metadata.sourceLabel: Global Shipping Lanes (CIA World Oceans map digitization)

sources.name: Global Shipping Lanes
sources.citation: Benden, P. (2022). Global Shipping Lanes [Data set]. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6361763
sources.note: Georeferenced from the CIA Map of the World's Oceans (October 2012).

sources.name: UNECE UN/LOCODE (data/ports.latest.json)
sources.note: Endpoint labels are the nearest UN/LOCODE port to each corridor end.

notes: Major and Middle tiers only; fragments under 200 km dropped; geometry simplified with a 0.05° Douglas-Peucker tolerance.
Endpoint port names are labels for display, not routing data.
